entry.title: 215. Kth Largest Element in an Array
entry.content:
LeetCode

Quickselect: O(N)

Java “Arrays.sort()” API (internal implementation: Dual-pivot Quicksort ): O(NlogN)

MergeSort: O(NlogN)

Naive solution: execution time (619 ms)

entry.title: 201. Bitwise AND of Numbers Range
entry.content:
https://leetcode.com/problems/bitwise-and-of-numbers-range/

intuitive solutions: exceed the time limit


Approach 1: Bit Shift

Approach 2: Brian Kernighan’s Algorithm (turn off the rightmost bit of one in a number)

entry.title: 187. Repeated DNA Sequences
entry.content:
https://leetcode.com/problems/repeated-dna-sequences/

Approach 1: Linear-time Slice Using Substring + HashSet

Approach 2: Rabin-Karp : Constant-time Slice Using Rolling Hash\
Rolling Hash Youtube

Approach 3: Bit Manipulation : Constant-time Slice Using Bitmask/
Bitmask Youtube
